race.comment: LEG DRIVE (1) is a four-year-old gelding who is having his first run for the Matt Kropp stable. Finished off last campaign with a rearward position at Flemington six months ago. Ran fourth in a trial at Toowoomba Inner Track over 925m and looks nicely placed. Can make a winning return. SUPER FAIR (5) doesn't boast the best winning strike rate but ran a strong race when fresh from a spell last time out, finishing second over this track and trip when she worked home well. Well placed and there is no reason she cannot find winning ways. KIDS INTHE KITCHEN (2) did a great job to score over this course and distance last start in a far better run. Looks well placed so expect another big run. JADDAF (4) got off the mark in fine style here two back and then was far from disgraced last time. Freshened and gets significant weight relief. Can play a role. RUBAAHY (9) next.
